data.title: South Korea construction industry projected to grow by CAGR of 2.60% in 2025-2034 due to gov't investments and smart city projects.
data.description: A report on the South Korea Construction Market predicts a steady growth with a projected CAGR of 2.60% from 2025 to 2034. The construction industry in South Korea is witnessing significant expansion due to rising government investments in infrastructure and the emergence of smart city projects. This market report has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, highlighting the opportunities and trends within the sector. Construction activities encompass the development of bridges, roads, and residential units, shaping the country's urban landscape.

data.title: Stellantis partners with GlobalPlatform to enhance global automotive cybersecurity standards.
data.description: Stellantis, a company based in Redwood City, California, has recently announced its partnership with GlobalPlatform in a move to enhance global automotive cybersecurity standards. This collaboration marks an important step in addressing cybersecurity concerns in the automotive industry. GlobalPlatform is a leading organization that focuses on developing secure platforms for connected devices. Stellantis joining this initiative highlights the company's commitment to ensuring cybersecurity in vehicles. This partnership aims to set new standards in cybersecurity and protect vehicles from potential cyber threats. The collaboration between Stellantis and GlobalPlatform signifies a significant development in promoting cybersecurity measures within the automotive sector.

data.title: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) will pay $1.25 per share dividend on Sep 26, 2025, to shareholders as of Sep 16, 2025.
data.description: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) in Tulsa, Oklahoma disclosed that a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for the third quarter of 2025 is scheduled to be issued on September 26, 2025. Shareholders recorded as of September 16, 2025, will be eligible for this payment. The dividend, which will come from the Company's available cash, is a testament to the financial health of Unit Corporation. This entity, based in Tulsa, is a prominent energy firm operating through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Bitcoin rebounds with profitability around 60%, trading at $111,000 but needs $114k-$116k for momentum, per Glassnode analysis.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) profitability has improved according to a recent analysis by Glassnode. The cryptocurrency is currently priced at around $111,000, consolidating within the $104,000–$116,000 range after significant absorption by investors. Short-term holder profitability, which had dropped to 42% during the recent selloff, has now risen to approximately 60%. However, despite this rebound, the market is considered neutral but delicate. Glassnode emphasized that for renewed momentum to be confirmed, Bitcoin's price must reclaim the $114,000–$116,000 range. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Boo at the Bronx Zoo offers Halloween excitement with animals and Dinosaur Safari, a fall tradition for all ages.
data.description: Boo at the Zoo, a cherished family tradition, is back at the Bronx Zoo in New York for the fall season. This event promises to offer thrilling new attractions for visitors of all ages.

data.title: Sanofi's stock fell after new eczema drug falls short compared to Dupixent, leading to a significant drop.
data.description: On Thursday, Sanofi's stock experienced a significant decline following disappointing results from their new eczema drug trial. The experimental drug was found to be notably less effective compared to Dupixent. This news caused a drop in Sanofi's stock value, emphasizing the competitive advantage of Dupixent in the market. The company faces challenges as investors react to the setback in drug development.

data.title: JasmyCoin price at $0.01 faces $0.02 resistance with bearish signals, analysts foresee a 14-day surge on Fed rate cut and IoT market.
data.description: Trading at $0.01, JASMY is currently showing bearish MACD signals. Analysts are anticipating a potential surge in the next 14 days due to expected Federal Reserve rate cuts and the positioning of the Internet of Things (IoT) market.

data.title: Global nuclear medicine software market estimated to be valued at USD 980.5 Mn in 2025, expected to reach USD 1,803.9 Mn by 2032 with a CAGR of 9.1%. Adoption of AI and machine learning, enhancing image analysis precision, boosting market growth. Shift towards cloud-based platforms and seamless integration with hospital systems driving efficiency and scalability. North America to account for nearly 2/5 of market share by 2025, Asia Pacific emerging as lucrative market. Alarming rise in chronic diseases fueling demand, yet high implementation costs posing a challenge to market growth. Advancements in imaging technologies creating new opportunities for software providers.
data.description: The global Nuclear Medicine Software Market is projected to reach USD 980.5 million in 2025 and is expected to grow to USD 1,803.9 million by 2032, with a CAGR of 9.1%. The use of artificial intelligence and machine learning is a key trend, enhancing image analysis accuracy. The market growth is driven by increasing cases of chronic diseases, especially cancer, leading to demand for precise diagnostic solutions. The adoption of cloud-based platforms and integration with hospital systems is also rising. Patient data management software and PET modalities are popular in the market. High implementation costs are a challenge, especially for smaller healthcare centers. However, technological advancements in imaging, such as PET and SPECT, are creating new opportunities for software providers. AI is making a significant impact in improving healthcare professionals' challenges in nuclear medicine software. North America holds a significant share in the market, with Asia Pacific showing potential growth opportunities.

data.title: RISR introduces new tools for advisors, including Succession & Exit Planning tool and wealth planning insights.
data.description: In Philadelphia, RISR, an engagement platform assisting business owners with financial planning, has unveiled its upgraded platform. This major update includes the industry's first tool focused on Succession & Exit Planning for financial planning. Alongside this, there have been improvements in wealth planning, valuation, and risk insights aimed at simplifying and personalizing the planning process for business owners. The enhanced platform strives to make planning more actionable, with a particular emphasis on Succession & Exit Planning, among other features.
